spec.precondition: requires valid(galloc) && valid(tensor) && valid(tensor_alloc) && galloc->n_buffers > 0 && tensor_alloc->buffer_id >= 0 && tensor_alloc->buffer_id < galloc->n_buffers && valid(galloc->bufts) && valid_range(galloc->bufts, 0, galloc->n_buffers) && valid(galloc->buffers) && valid_range(galloc->buffers, 0, galloc->n_buffers) && (galloc->buffers[tensor_alloc->buffer_id] != NULL implies valid(galloc->buffers[tensor_alloc->buffer_id])) && (tensor->view_src != NULL implies valid(tensor->view_src)) && (tensor_alloc->addr.offset != SIZE_MAX implies tensor_alloc->size_max >= ggml_backend_buft_get_alloc_size(galloc->bufts[tensor_alloc->buffer_id], tensor)) && (tensor->data == NULL && tensor->view_src == NULL implies tensor_alloc->addr.offset != SIZE_MAX) && (tensor->view_src != NULL && tensor->data == NULL && tensor->buffer == NULL implies tensor_alloc->addr.offset == SIZE_MAX)
spec.postcondition: ensures (tensor->view_src != NULL implies (tensor->buffer != NULL || (tensor->view_src->buffer == NULL))) && (tensor->view_src == NULL && tensor->data == NULL implies (tensor->buffer != NULL && tensor->data != NULL)) && (result == void implies (tensor->buffer != NULL || tensor->data != NULL || (tensor->view_src != NULL && tensor->view_src->buffer == NULL)))

ggml_vbuffer_tensor_alloc.precondition: requires valid(buf) && valid(tensor) && null(tensor->data) && null(tensor->view_src) && in_bounds(buf->chunks, buf_addr.chunk) && valid(buf->chunks[buf_addr.chunk]) && buf_addr.offset != SIZE_MAX && buf_addr.offset + ggml_backend_buft_get_alloc_size(ggml_backend_buffer_get_type(buf->chunks[buf_addr.chunk]), tensor) <= ggml_backend_buffer_get_size(buf->chunks[buf_addr.chunk])
ggml_vbuffer_tensor_alloc.postcondition: ensures valid(tensor->buffer) && valid(tensor->data) && tensor->data points to allocated memory at buf_addr.offset within buf->chunks[buf_addr.chunk] && tensor->buffer == buf->chunks[buf_addr.chunk]
